title_en: Ibn Hibban and His Unique Organizational Approach
title_id: Ibn Hibban dan Pendekatan Organisasionalnya yang Unik
content_en:
Muhammad ibn Hibban ibn Ahmad al-Busti (270–354 AH / 884–965 CE) was one of the major hadith scholars of the fourth Islamic century, a student of Ibn Khuzaymah and a contemporary of at-Tabarani. He was born in Bust (in modern Afghanistan) and traveled widely across the Islamic world for his hadith studies before settling in Nishapur, where he served as a judge and teacher. His breadth of learning was remarkable, extending beyond hadith to medicine, astronomy, and other disciplines.

Ibn Hibban's major contribution to the hadith sciences comes in two paired works: Kitab ath-Thiqat (The Book of Reliable Narrators), a biographical dictionary of trustworthy hadith transmitters, and al-Majruhin min al-Muhaddithun wa ad-Du'afa wal-Matrukin (The Criticized Among Hadith Scholars, the Weak and the Abandoned), its complement covering criticized narrators. Together these works provide Ibn Hibban's systematic assessment of the narrator tradition.

His hadith collection, known as al-Musnad as-Sahih ala at-Taqasim wal-Anwa' (The Authenticated Musnad According to Divisions and Types), is commonly called Sahih Ibn Hibban or al-Ihsan fi Taqrib Sahih Ibn Hibban (the title of the reorganized version by Ibn Balban al-Farisi). The original work was organized according to Ibn Hibban's own unusual classification system based on categories of religious knowledge and legal principles — a system so complex that it required a comprehensive index (provided by Ibn Balban's reorganization) to be usable in practice.

Ibn Hibban deliberately departed from the standard thematic organization of the Sunan collections and the alphabetical-by-Companion organization of the Musnads, instead creating a complex structure that reflected his philosophical conception of how prophetic knowledge should be categorized. This innovative organization, combined with the high quality of the hadiths he selected, makes Sahih Ibn Hibban a uniquely important and challenging work in the sahih collection tradition. Ibn Balban al-Farisi's reorganization — published as al-Ihsan fi Taqrib Sahih Ibn Hibban — transformed the collection from a scholarly puzzle into a practical reference, and it is in this reorganized form that the work is most widely studied and cited in the hadith literature today.
content_id:
Muhammad ibn Hibban ibn Ahmad al-Busti (270–354 H / 884–965 M) adalah salah satu ulama hadis utama pada abad keempat Hijriah, seorang murid Ibn Khuzaymah dan sezaman dengan al-Thabarani. Beliau lahir di Bust (di Afghanistan modern) dan melakukan perjalanan luas melintasi dunia Islam untuk kajian hadisnya sebelum menetap di Nishapur, di mana beliau menjabat sebagai hakim dan pengajar. Keluasan keilmuannya sangat luar biasa, meluas melampaui hadis ke bidang kedokteran, astronomi, dan disiplin-disiplin lainnya.

Kontribusi utama Ibn Hibban bagi ilmu-ilmu hadis terdapat dalam dua karya yang berpasangan: Kitab al-Tsiqat (Kitab Perawi Terpercaya), kamus biografi para perawi hadis yang terpercaya, dan al-Majruhin min al-Muhadditsin wa al-Dhu'afa wal-Matrukin (Para Perawi Hadis yang Dikritik, yang Lemah dan yang Ditinggalkan), pelengkapnya yang mencakup perawi-perawi yang dikritik. Bersama-sama karya-karya ini memberikan penilaian sistematis Ibn Hibban tentang tradisi perawi.

Koleksi hadisnya, yang dikenal sebagai al-Musnad al-Sahih ala al-Taqasim wal-Anwa' (Musnad yang Terautentikasi Berdasarkan Pembagian dan Jenis), umumnya disebut Sahih Ibn Hibban atau al-Ihsan fi Taqrib Sahih Ibn Hibban (judul versi yang diorganisasikan ulang oleh Ibn Balban al-Farisi). Karya asli diorganisasikan menurut sistem klasifikasi Ibn Hibban sendiri yang tidak biasa berdasarkan kategori-kategori pengetahuan keagamaan dan prinsip-prinsip hukum — sebuah sistem yang begitu kompleks sehingga memerlukan indeks komprehensif (yang disediakan oleh penataan ulang Ibn Balban) agar dapat digunakan secara praktis.

Ibn Hibban sengaja menyimpang dari organisasi tematik standar koleksi-koleksi Sunan dan organisasi berdasarkan-Sahabat secara alfabetis dari musnad-musnad, melainkan menciptakan struktur yang kompleks yang mencerminkan konsepsi filosofisnya tentang bagaimana pengetahuan kenabian harus dikategorikan. Organisasi yang inovatif ini, dikombinasikan dengan kualitas tinggi hadis-hadis yang dipilihnya, menjadikan Sahih Ibn Hibban karya yang unik penting dan menantang dalam tradisi koleksi sahih. Penataan ulang Ibn Balban al-Farisi — diterbitkan sebagai al-Ihsan fi Taqrib Sahih Ibn Hibban — mengubah koleksi dari teka-teki ilmiah menjadi referensi praktis, dan dalam bentuk yang diorganisasikan ulang inilah karya ini paling banyak dipelajari dan dikutip dalam literatur hadis saat ini.
